# Gcore FastEdge

- [FastEdge](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge.md)
- [FastEdge overview](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/getting-started.md): Deploy WebAssembly functions on Gcore's edge network for serverless execution with HTTP request/response modification, A/B testing, personalization, and CDN ...

## Create apps
- [Create FastEdge apps](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/create-apps.md): Deploy HTTP and CDN FastEdge applications using Rust SDK, JavaScript SDK, or Proxy-Wasm on Gcore's serverless CDN network.
- [Create FastEdge HTTP applications](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/getting-started/create-fastedge-apps.md): Build FastEdge HTTP applications using Rust or JavaScript SDKs to compile WebAssembly binaries, then deploy via Customer Portal or API.
- [Extend CDN functionality with FastEdge](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/getting-started/integrate-cdn-with-fastedge.md): Integrate FastEdge serverless compute with CDN edge nodes to extend content delivery with custom logic and request/response manipulation.
- [CDN properties](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/getting-started/cdn-properties.md): Access and modify HTTP request/response properties via Proxy-Wasm ABI hooks using read/write methods; properties include URL path, headers, geolocation data,...
- [Manage FastEdge apps](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/manage-apps.md): View, start, stop, and configure FastEdge HTTP and CDN applications; manage environment variables, secrets, Edge Storage, response headers, metrics, and appl...
- [Create and manage templates](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/create-manage-templates.md): Create FastEdge templates with custom binaries, parameters, secrets, and environment variables for HTTP and CDN applications via Customer Portal.

## Secrets Manager
- [Secrets Manager](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/secrets-manager/manage-secrets.md): Store and manage encrypted secrets across FastEdge applications using Secrets Manager with create, edit, delete, and slot-based access operations.
- [Secrets Slots](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/secrets-manager/slots.md): Implement secret rotation using Slots mechanism to access versioned encrypted secrets by index or timestamp without deleting old values.

## Edge Storage
- [How it works](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/kv-stores/how-it-works.md): Deploy distributed key-value storage instances co-located with FastEdge WASM runtime at every edge location for sub-millisecond read latency and eventual con...
- [Edge Storage](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/kv-stores/manage-kv-store.md): Create and manage key-value pairs in Edge Storage across Gcore's global edge network with insert, edit, delete, and file upload operations via FastEdge portal.
- [Sorted Set](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/kv-stores/sorted-set.md): Create, edit, and delete Sorted Sets (ZSET) in Gcore FastEdge Edge Storage with score-ordered members for leaderboards and rankings.
- [Bloom Filter](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/kv-stores/bloom-filter.md): Create and manage Bloom Filters in FastEdge Edge Storage via Gcore Customer Portal for space-efficient membership testing with configurable hash functions an...
- [Troubleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/troubleshooting.md): Diagnose FastEdge application failures using HTTP status codes (530, 531, 532, 533) for memory limits, timeouts, crashes, and internal errors.
- [FastEdge CLI](https://gcore.com/docs/fastedge/fastedge-cli.md): Install, build, and execute FastEdge HTTP applications locally using FastEdge CLI with Rust, including environment variables, geo headers, and request testin...
